programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast. [S] [HD]

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Highlights of five Premier League games as title-chasing Arsenal take on Fulham at the Emirates and Brighton continue their push for European football next season at Newcastle. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg
programme.desc: Laura Kuenssberg is joined by transport secretary Heidi Alexander MP, Conservative leader Kemi Badenoch MP and leader of the Green Party of England and Wales Zack Polanski. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Politics South West
programme.desc: Martyn Oates with the latest political news and debate. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Trolls World Tour
programme.desc: Six troll tribes clash over their devotion to different types of music. Queen Poppy has to prevent Queen Barb of the rock tribe from destroying all other music. [2020] [S,AD] [HD]

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Songs of Praise: Claire McCollum's Faith Journey
programme.desc: Aled Jones is in Belfast with fellow presenter Claire McCollum to hear about the people, places and hymns that have shaped her life and faith. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Points of View
programme.desc: 1/20. Viewers have their say on the BBC's television shows. Email your thoughts to pov@bbc.co.uk. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of day 16 of the World Snooker Championship at the Crucible Theatre, Sheffield. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Planet Earth Live
programme.desc: 2/5. Wildlife documentary telling the story of Moja, a five-month-old lion cub living with his single lioness mum, Nyota, in Kenya's Masai Mara. Together, they face a fight for life. [S] [HD]

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Spotlight
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, weather and features from the South West of England. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Matt Baker and Vick Hope explore the chalk landscapes of the Chilterns, where rare grasslands, seasonal streams and specialised wildlife all depend on the fragile ground beneath their feet. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Secret Garden
programme.desc: 5/5. David Attenborough reveals how a remote garden on Scotland's west coast has become an oasis for barn owls and pine martens as they battle the elements to feed, breed and survive. [S,AD] [HD]

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow goes to Belmont House in Kent, where treasures include a piece of HMS Bounty and a collection of sneakers, while Fiona gets to foxtrot with guest Anton Du Beke. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Making Life on Earth:...
programme.desc: ...Attenborough's Greatest Adventure. The epic story of the blockbuster series that changed David Attenborough's life forever. [S,AD] [HD]

programme.title: The Cage
programme.desc: 2/5. Gary realises someone is skimming, and Matty and Leanne panic. Ning pressures Matty. Contains strong language and some violent scenes. [S,AD] [HD]

programme.title: BBC News and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Spotlight
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, weather and features from the South West of England. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Kelly Cates presents highlights of three Premier League matches. Manchester United host Liverpool, Aston Villa are at home against Tottenham Hotspur and Crystal Palace travel to Bournemouth. [S] [HD]

programme.title: The Women's Football Show
programme.desc: The big names and the big games from the Women's Super League, with highlights and analysis of all the action. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Mint
programme.desc: 3/8. Ladies day turns ugly as tensions flare. Shannon and Arran are caught in the crossfire. Contains strong language and some violent scenes. [S,AD,SL] [HD]

programme.title: Mint
programme.desc: 4/8. Shannon escapes the tension at home to spend a life-changing day with Arran. Contains strong language. [S,AD,SL] [HD]

programme.title: The Cage
programme.desc: 1/5. Matty and Leanne agree to stop skimming cash, but as their lives unravel, the pact frays. Contains strong language. [S,AD,SL] [HD]

programme.title: This is BBC Two
programme.desc: Highlights of programmes on BBC Two. [HD]

programme.title: Take a Hike
programme.desc: 14/15. In the Highlands and Islands of Scotland, biscuit taster Cathy leads a walk with a taste of tradition. But will her hike from picture-postcard Tobermory take the biscuit? [S] [HD]

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Adam Henson and Sammi Kinghorn head to the Vale of Evesham, where fertile soils and a mild microclimate have long made it one of Britain's most productive growing regions. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Landward
programme.desc: 4/26. Dougie visits a dairy farm near Torthorwald in Dumfriesshire for spring calving on a grand scale. Meanwhile, Cammy is on home turf in Ayrshire as early potato planting gets under way. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: 5/26. Kirsty Wilson and Brian Cunningham start growing a wide variety of edible produce, and Brian provides an update on the veg he sowed at the start of the series. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Best Bites
programme.desc: A feast of food from Poppy O'Toole, Joe Hurd, Ols Halas and Jack Croft and Will Murray. Also, Rick Stein and Clive Myrie head out of the studio. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Andi Oliver's Fabulous Feasts
programme.desc: 2/8. Andi is in Bristol, putting on a party with a Caribbean flavour to launch a community cafe at a pioneering homeless project that turns shipping containers into temporary housing. [S,AD] [HD]

programme.title: Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The lives of a diverse group of guests intersect during an eventful few days at a luxury Berlin hotel. Classic star-studded drama from MGM studios. [1932] [S] [HD]

programme.title: MOTD Live: Women's Super...
programme.desc: ...League: Leicester City v Chelsea. Coverage of the Women's Super League clash between Leicester City and Chelsea. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Members of the public bring their antiques to be viewed and valued. [S] [HD]

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: 1/12. Following six farming families in some of Scotland's most stunning and remote locations. [S] [HD]

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of day 16 of the World Snooker Championship at the Crucible Theatre, Sheffield. [S] [HD]
During the First World War, two soldiers must cross no-man's-land to deliver a message. Contains some strong language, some violence and some upsetting scenes. [2019] [S,AD] [HD]

programme.title: Here We Are
programme.desc: A father runs away with his autistic son on a journey of escape and self-discovery. Deals with adult themes. [2020] [S] [HD]

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Seascape: Gordon Ramsay visits the Seascape restaurant in the seaside village of Islip, on Long Island in New York, where owner Peter has nearly a million dollars of debt. (S1 Ep3) [SL]

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in Rotterdam
programme.desc: Joe Lycett and Alex Brooker make a splash on their Wikkelboat floating homes before taking a rooftop tour, tickling their tastebuds with fermented flavours and having a go at pinball. [SL]

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Sarah Beeny meets people making life-changing moves from city to country. James sets out to create a boutique country hotel, but is that the best way to earn a new living? (Ep1)

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Some extra brunch as Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart Gets Famous: Thanks to his new catchphrase, 'I didn't do it', Bart becomes famous, getting his own TV series and releasing a range of merchandise. (S5 Ep12/22)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Apu: When Apu loses the Kwik-E-Mart, he moves in with the Simpsons. And then Homer joins him on a pilgrimage to the first ever Kwik-E-Mart, in the Himalayas. (S5 Ep13/22)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Rosebud: He may be obscenely rich, but Mr Burns can never be truly happy without his childhood teddy bear, Bobo, who Bart finds in a bag of ice and gives to Maggie. (S5 Ep4/22)

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Clothes Encounter: Carrie can't stop buying expensive clothes and then taking them back to the shops within a few days. Spence's new girlfriend is terrified of his dog. (S5 Ep21/25)

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Queens'bro Bridge: Doug thinks he might finally be able to get his father-in-law to move out when he discovers that Arthur has inherited a house nearby. (S5 Ep22/25)

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Taste Buds: When Carrie agrees to Arthur's choices of what to have for dinner and which movie to rent, Doug gets upset that he doesn't get his way. (S5 Ep24/25)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Prodigal Son: When Ray agrees to go back to church, he soon discovers why Frank is happy to attend every week. (S4 Ep14)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert's Rodeo: When Robert is injured in the line of duty, Ray realises that he is partly - although unwittingly - responsible. (S4 Ep15)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Tenth Anniversary: When Debra discovers that Ray taped over their wedding video with the Super Bowl, he has to go to extreme lengths to make it up to her. (S4 Ep16)

programme.title: F1 Miami GP Sprint and...
programme.desc: ...Qualifying Highlights: There's no room for error in the second Sprint race of the season. Then the teams must refocus to secure the best possible starting position for the GP.

programme.title: Live: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show, with guests Russell Kane, Gregor Fisher, Greg McHugh, Lena Hall and Kerry Katona, and music from Tyler Ballgame.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge on the Lam: Marge and her new friend Ruth Powers set off on a Thelma and Louise-style adventure, with Chief Wiggum and Homer in hot pursuit... (S5 Ep6/22)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Boy-Scoutz 'n the Hood: During an all-syrup Squishee bender, Bart joins the junior campers, and ends up taking the embarrassing - and dangerous - Homer on a river rafting trip. (S5 Ep8/22)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Tay House in Perth and Kinross, where the B&Bers aren't too happy about a lack of TVs. And there's something fishy going on at breakfast...

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the Aberlour Hotel in Moray, where the B&Bers are in good spirits at a distillery. But there's a hangover at feedback time.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Visit three is to Cobblehouse Country Cabins in Aberdeenshire. Graham and Emma hope the B&Bers will be wowed by their wood. Will everyone be left pining for more?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Yuliya hosts the final visit at Trinity Boutique B&B in Peterhead. She takes her guests directly to jail (just visiting). But will she offer them more than just porridge at breakfast?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day brings cutting questions, cleanliness concerns and a Moroccan mismatch as the B&Bers find out who's won the week.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Liz dreams of owning a holiday home in her favourite part of Catalunya: Sitges. Will any of Jasmine Harman's options for £180k impress her enough to make an offer?

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George transforms a rusty lift into a cabin in the sky, and heads to Denmark to visit a modern Viking longhouse. Plus: the pinkest thing to ever appear on the show! (S12 Ep1)

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
programme.desc: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Kate Garraway, Phil Wang, Gbemisola Ikumelo and Sophie Willan take on mini loaf cakes and reveal their hidden talents in showstopping choux.

programme.title: New: Cruising to the Ends of...
programme.desc: ...the Earth: As the sparkling Diamond Princess glides into South Korea, guests enjoy the colourful Gamcheon Culture Village, while Alaskan cruisers witness the Mendenhall Glacier. (Ep2)

programme.title: New: Your Song
programme.desc: A former Birmingham City footballer sings for her grandad. A navy officer performs Nessun Dorma and brings the shoppers to a standstill. And Nat King Cole has everyone dancing. (Ep4)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers settle down for I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, Virgin Island, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, The Neighbourhood, Made in Chelsea and How to Clean-Up for Cash. (S27 Ep13)

programme.title: F1 Miami GP Highlights
programme.desc: The drivers push their cars to the ragged edge of grip and control, battling each other and the Miami heat. Can anyone beat dominant Mercedes or will Antonelli make it three in a row?

programme.title: Orlando Bloom: To the Edge
programme.desc: Free Dive: The Emotional Edge: The actor heads to the Bahamas to learn how to free dive and overcome physical and emotional setbacks to reach a depth of 100 feet in just one breath. S1 Ep2

programme.title: Orlando Bloom: To the Edge
programme.desc: Rock Climb: The Physical Edge: The actor heads to Moab to train with an adaptive rock climber and push himself over the edge in order to climb a seemingly impossible 400-foot-high pinnacle. S1 Ep3

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score as few points as possible by plumbing the depths of their general knowledge to come up with the answers that no-one else can think of. S26 Ep14

programme.title: Top Gear: Nepal Special
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness, Freddie Flintoff and Chris Harris set off on a trek from Kathmandu, the capital of Nepal, to the Forbidden City of Lo Manthang.

programme.title: Top Gear: Bolivia Special
programme.desc: The boys are dropped deep into the Bolivian rainforest armed only with three 4x4s. They must drive all the way to the Chilean coast - via drug lords and debilitating altitude. S14 Ep6

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Cork: Forget F1 and NASCAR, the Red Bull Soapbox Race is the real test of a driver's skill and courage. Soapbox racers pit their crazy crates against a lethal course in Cork. S4 Ep1

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul and Bob take trusty terrier Ted to fish for perch on the River Thames before comedian Richard Herring joins the three of them for dinner. S5 Ep4

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul and Bob visit the heart of the English countryside in the Surrey Hills to fish for carp and barbel before health expert Dr Anand Patel joins them by the lake. S5 Ep5

programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul and Bob venture to Lough Corrib - Ireland's largest lough and one of the best places in the country to try trout fishing - and meet Undertones singer Fergal Sharkey. S5 Ep6

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Luxury Lunches: The Bikers show that a luxury lunch is possible on even the tightest of budgets and pick up some secrets from one of Britain's best Indian chefs. S1 Ep5

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Restaurant Revelations: The Bikers create a restaurant-quality meal on the tightest of budgets and pick up some foraging tips. S1 Ep6

programme.title: The Lakes with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve explores the impact of humans on the Lake District, discovering the high number of visitors to Scafell Pike is damaging the mountain and stretching rescue resources. S1 Ep2

programme.title: The Lakes with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve comes to the end of his travels by exploring the rugged coast of Cumbria and learning how central the county is to many challenges facing Britain. S1 Ep3

programme.title: New: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers discover bundles of cocaine hidden inside the wheel wells of an SUV, and two retirees are caught trying to smuggle weight loss medication across the border. S7 Ep1

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: Britain's most talented detectives pursue a violent drug gang in Gloucester, an aggressive mugger in sleepy Kent, and a gang of men stealing Britain's history in Cheshire. S1 Ep2

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Guest host Romesh Ranganathan and guest panellists Alice Levine and Grayson Perry join team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop. S60 Ep10

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Roaming: Sandi Toksvig goes roaming with Alan Davies, Sara Pascoe, Josh Widdicombe and Benjamin Zephaniah. S18 Ep11

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Joining Dara O Briain and Hugh Dennis for the usual mixture of panel show, improv games and stand-up are James Acaster, Tom Allen, Ed Byrne, Rhys James and Ellie Taylor. S16 Ep8

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara O Briain and Hugh Dennis are joined by James Acaster, Ed Byrne, Gary Delaney, Ivo Graham and Zoe Lyons to take a satirical look at the week's goings-on. S16 Ep9

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Colin was born with a birth defect that resulted in a missing leg. With a shared sense of humour, he hits it off with phlebotomist Tracey, but will he reveal his disability? (S7 Ep14/17) [SL]

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time on the 'Box: Adolescence, 99 to Beat, Coronation Street, David Blaine: Do Not Attempt, Big Night of Musicals by The National Lottery and Building Britain's Superhomes. (S25 Ep7) [SL]

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time it's Adolescence, Tribe with Bruce Parry, and Bad Dog Academy. Also Tempting Fortune, The Yorkshire Vet, and Million Dollar Secret. (S25 Ep8) [SL]

programme.title: Don't Spook the Bride
programme.desc: The Day of the Dead One: Fiery bride Jenna is in for a scary surprise as her fiancé Nathan is planning a Mexican Day of the Dead themed wedding for her.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One with the Helicopter: Reece, who is ex-military, plans a wedding with an army twist. But his bride Lucy would prefer something in a castle.

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Ste faces a big decision. The fourth member of the Keane family arrives. Cleo struggles with guilt. Pearl tries to build bridges between torn families. And Diane confides in Tony and Leela.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Coal Digger: The family are invited to Jay and Gloria's for a barbecue and football, but an incident at school between Manny and Luke makes things awkward for Gloria and Claire. (S1 Ep5)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Run for Your Wife: On the kids' first day back at school, Phil oversteps when he misreads how Claire's coping with an empty nest. (S1 Ep6)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: En Garde: The family supports Manny's new interest - fencing. It turns out he's pretty good at it, but Jay's proud enthusiasm triggers an old childhood wound for Mitchell. (S1 Ep7)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Great Expectations: With a history of giving bad gifts, Claire is determined to surprise Phil with an amazing anniversary present - a private performance by Izzy LaFontaine. (S1 Ep8)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Fizbo: Phil and Claire throw Luke the biggest birthday party a boy could want. But when Cameron appears as a clown named Fizbo, it sets off a chain of events that ends in hospital. (S1 Ep9)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Sante La Brea: Gordon visits Sante La Brea, a health food restaurant in Hollywood. But there's nothing glamorous about this eatery as owner Dean faces financial ruin. (S2 Ep11)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Cafe 36: Gordon Ramsay visits Cafe 36 in Chicago. Husband-and-wife team Terry and Carol are stuck in the past and their head chef's lax attitude is driving away customers. (S2 Ep10)

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Brand new series: The homestays continue, but real-world problems are putting all of the couples under strain. And there's a devastating confession. (S13 Ep31)

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Brand new series: Distrust and uncertainty are hanging in the air like a bad smell after the homestays. So what better time for the penultimate dinner party? (S13 Ep32)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Yokel Hero: Cletus becomes a singing sensation, while Homer becomes a new man. But when Cletus turns on his fans he ruins everything. (S32 Ep14)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Do Pizza Bots Dream of Electric Guitars: Homer tries to reunite a mechanical band from his youth, but film and TV creator JJ Abrams gets hold of them first. (S32 Ep15)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Burger Kings: Mr Burns gets into the plant-based burger business. But Lisa is convinced that he has an ulterior motive. (S32 Ep18)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Panic on the Streets of Springfield: Lisa develops an imaginary friendship with a morose British singer. Homer gets a powerful truck. (S32 Ep19)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Meat Is Murder: Grampa's old friend Gus wants his help at the helm of his fast-food empire, leading to a Succession-style plot of corporate espionage. With John Lithgow. (S33 Ep21)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Poorhouse Rock: Bart ends up idolising Homer after accompanying him to work, and resolves to grow up just like him. But Lisa and Hugh Jackman have some alarming news for him... (S33 Ep22)

programme.title: New: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: Brand new series: Our teams go back to school at an extraordinary floating classroom on Cambodia's Tonlé Sap Lake. But who'll come a cropper after a hard-graft harvesting task? (S7 Ep8)

programme.title: Mrs Doubtfire
programme.desc: (1993) Comedy starring Robin Williams and Sally Field. A struggling actor disguises himself as a female housekeeper so that he can spend more time with his kids.

programme.title: The Predator
programme.desc: (2018) Unrestrained reboot of the franchise defined by a ruthless extraterrestrial killer whose name says it all... and it's had a DNA upgrade. All the better to kill you with, my dear.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time, Britain's Got Talent, The Thief, His Wife and the Canoe, Romeo and Duet, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof, Roar, and Stacey Dooley Sleeps Over. (S19 Ep10) [SL]

programme.title: The Tower
programme.desc: Crime thriller. A stabbing leads DS Sarah Collins into the path of an undercover unit led by Kieran Shaw, and Lizzie Adama is back at Farlow balancing being a DC with family life. [SL] S3 Ep1

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Fern Britton: Inside the Vet's
programme.desc: The vets investigate why a senior cat is out of sorts, Rusty the Labrador's lost appetite puzzles vet James, and a specialist hydrotherapy clinic aids two dogs' mobility. [SL] S1 Ep3

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: Lyon: James Martin's travels around France continue in the city of Lyon - the gastronomic capital of France - as he explores the two sides of the culinary scene there. S1 Ep6

programme.title: James Martin's Saturday Morning
programme.desc: James is joined by presenter, DJ and I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here! star Kelly Brook, chefs Tommy Banks and Alex Dilling, and forager Alysia Vasey.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.

programme.title: New: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Joining Alan Titchmarsh at Manor Farm this Bank Holiday weekend are Stephen and Anita Mangan, Rita Tushingham and royal biographer Robert Hardman.

programme.title: New: Josie's Taste of the Westcountry
programme.desc: Somerset: Josie boards a traditional train along the magnificent Somerset coast, learns oyster-shucking and cider-making, and delves into Cheddar Gorge's cheesiest caves. S1 Ep2

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh heads to Swindon to surprise Lorraine - a retired RAF servicewoman and devoted charity volunteer - and create a low-maintenance garden for her and her dogs.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.

programme.title: ITV Racing: Live from Newmarket
programme.desc: Francesca Cumani and Ed Chamberlin present live racing from Newmarket - including the 1,000 Guineas - Hamilton and Salisbury. Richard Hoiles provides the commentary.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Heart-warming sci-fi adventure film starring Henry Thomas and Drew Barrymore, 1982. A young boy tries to help a gentle alien who has been stranded on Earth and needs to phone home.

programme.title: Tipping Point: Best Ever Finals
programme.desc: A look back at more of Tipping Point's most thrilling end games as plucky players and famous faces alike take on the machine for its jackpot.

programme.title: ITV Evening News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.

programme.title: ITV News Anglia
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from the East of England.

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as Richard Bacon, Daisy Arwen Campbell, Neil Jones and Gary Wilmot take on the challenge and hope to win thousands of pounds for their chosen charities.

programme.title: New: Who Wants to Be a...
programme.desc: ...Millionaire? Jeremy Clarkson hosts as six more players go head-to-head for a place in the Millionaire chair - 15 correct answers is all they need to win the ultimate prize.

programme.title: New: Secret Service
programme.desc: Action-packed thriller. Kate's bold rescue mission in Malta backfires and she draws flak from all sides, but she must now find a mole inside the UK Government and in her MI6 team.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.

programme.title: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: Oscar-winning action crime drama film sequel starring Christian Bale and Heath Ledger, 2008. The Joker wreaks havoc on Gotham City to force Batman to reveal his true identity.

programme.title: Sky News
programme.desc: A round up of all the latest news from the UK and around the world.

programme.title: Sky News
programme.desc: A round up of all the latest news from the UK and around the world.

programme.title: Sky News
programme.desc: A round up of all the latest news from the UK and around the world.

programme.title: Sky News

programme.title: Sky News
programme.desc: A round up of all the latest news from the UK and around the world.

programme.title: Mornings with Jones and Melbourne
programme.desc: All the big stories of the morning plus news making interviews, analysis and eyewitness reports from around the world.

programme.title: Mornings with Jones and Melbourne
programme.desc: All the big stories of the morning plus news making interviews, analysis and eyewitness reports from around the world.

programme.title: Mornings with Jones and Melbourne

programme.title: Mornings with Jones and Melbourne
programme.desc: All the big stories of the morning plus news making interviews, analysis and eyewitness reports from around the world.

programme.title: UEL & UECL Highlights Show
programme.desc: Highlights of all the best action from the Europa League and the Conference League, featuring Nottingham Forest v Aston Villa and Shakhtar Donetsk v Crystal Palace.

programme.title: WorldSBK: Superbike - Race 1
programme.desc: FIM Superbike World Championship action from Superbike race one at Balaton Park Circuit in Hungary.

programme.title: UCI Mountain Bike World Series Men
programme.desc: Action from the elite downhill at the men's UCI Mountain Bike World Series in Yongpyong, South Korea.

programme.title: Mountain Bike World Series Women
programme.desc: Action from the elite downhill at the women's UCI Mountain Bike World Series in Yongpyong, South Korea.

programme.title: Live: Mountain Bike World Series
programme.desc: Action from the elite cross country Olympic at the women's UCI Mountain Bike World Series in Yongpyong, South Korea.

programme.title: Live: Mountain Bike World Series
programme.desc: Action from the elite cross country Olympic at the men's UCI Mountain Bike World Series in Yongpyong, South Korea.

programme.title: Live: Tour of Turkiye - Stage 8
programme.desc: Action from the final stage of the 2026 Tour of Turkiye, featuring a 108km circuit around the capital city of Ankara.

programme.title: Playing For Our Future - Cycling
programme.desc: What does the future hold for cycling in the battle against global warming? Reshmin Chowdhury meets people at all levels to discuss how cycling can be a positive force for change.

programme.title: Live: Vuelta a Espana - Stage 1
programme.desc: Women's cycling action from the opening stage of the 2026 Vuelta a Espana, which sees the riders depart from Marin on a 113km hilly route to Salvaterra de Mino.

programme.title: Live: Tour of Romandie - Stage 5
programme.desc: Action from the closing stage of the 2026 Tour of Romandie, as the peloton tackle a 178km route from Lucens to a mountaintop finish in Leysin.

programme.title: Live: Formula E World Championship
programme.desc: Action from round eight of the 2026 ABB FIA Formula E World Championship at Tempelhof Airport Street Circuit in Berlin, Germany.

programme.title: WRC Magazine: Rally Portugal
programme.desc: The latest news and action from Rally Portugal and the 2026 World Rally Championship.

programme.title: Mountain Bike World Series Women
programme.desc: Action from the elite cross country Olympic at the women's UCI Mountain Bike World Series in Yongpyong, South Korea.

programme.title: UCI Mountain Bike World Series Men
programme.desc: Action from the elite cross country Olympic at the men's UCI Mountain Bike World Series in Yongpyong, South Korea.

programme.title: Live PL: Aston Villa v Spurs
programme.desc: Tottenham Hotspur chase crucial points in their battle for Premier League survival as they face an Aston Villa side determined to cement their Champions League place.

programme.title: Live MLB: Guardians @ Atheltics
programme.desc: Action from Major League Baseball as Cleveland Guardians take on the Athletics in the final game of this series at Sutter Health Park.
